item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 88 pts (0.451) Buffalo Sabres – 86 pts (0.434) Tampa Bay Lightning – 84 pts (0.438) Montreal Canadiens – 82 pts (0.427) Pittsburgh Penguins – 79 pts (0.405) New York Islanders – 79 pts (0.405) Detroit Red Wings – 79 pts (0.399) Boston Bruins – 78 pts (0.4) Columbus Blue Jackets – 77 pts (0.395) Ottawa Senators – 73 pts (0.38) Philadelphia Flyers – 73 pts (0.374) Washington Capitals – 73 pts (0.363) Florida Panthers – 69 pts (0.354) Toronto Maple Leafs – 67 pts (0.338) New Jersey Devils – 66 pts (0.338) New York Rangers – 62 pts (0.318) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
